backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the hostel listing backend with data types for Hostel, Category, and RoomSharing, sample hostel data initialization, and blob storage mixin inclusion.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a Google site verification HTML file feature to its implementing component (SeoInfoBanner.tsx) with associated test ID REQ-37.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags including Open Graph, Twitter Card, canonical URL, geo tags, and keywords targeting Hyderabad hostel searches.
frontend/public/googlee7577b039261c25d.h: Google Search Console site verification file containing the standard verification token for the domain.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers full site access and pointing to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the home, privacy, and disclaimer pages with last-modified dates, change frequencies, and priority values for SEO crawling.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for home, hostel detail, add hostel, edit hostel, privacy, and disclaimer pages under a shared Layout.
Collapsible filter panel component providing price range inputs and room sharing type checkboxes with an active filter count badge and a clear-all option.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter bar rendering styled toggle buttons for All, Girls, Boys, and Co-Living hostel categories with active gradient styling.
frontend/src/components/HostelCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for a single hostel with image, category badge, address, contact, description, and price range derived from room capacity details.
frontend/src/components/HostelGrid.tsx: Displays a responsive grid of HostelCard components with loading spinner and empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/components/HostelMap.tsx: Renders a visual pseudo-map of hostel locations using DOM manipulation with color-coded markers and hover tooltips, without a real mapping library.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Image gallery component with a main large image, previous/next navigation arrows, image counter, and clickable thumbnails for multi-image hostels.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with navigation links, an Outlet for page content, and a footer with privacy/disclaimer links and attribution.
frontend/src/components/MapLocationPicke: Google Maps-based location picker that loads the Maps JS API dynamically, supports address autocomplete, map click, and draggable marker to select and emit a location.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input with a search icon and a clear button that appears when the input has a value.
frontend/src/components/SeoInfoBanner.ts: A dismissible banner component that prompts users to submit their site to Google Search Console for faster indexing, storing dismissal state in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/SortControls.tsx: A dropdown sort control component that allows users to sort listings by price, name, or location using a Select UI element.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useMutations.ts: Provides React Query mutation hooks for adding and updating hostels via the ICP backend actor, invalidating relevant cached queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all hostels, hostels by category, and a single hostel by ID from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines Tailwind base styles and a warm color palette (terracotta, sage, amber) with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddHostel.tsx: A form page for adding a new hostel listing, collecting name, category, description, address (with map picker), room sharing pricing options, and owner contact, then submitting via the useAddHostel mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Static page rendering the Hostel Finder disclaimer, covering general information, liability limitations, user-generated content, third-party links, and terms of use.
frontend/src/pages/EditHostel.tsx: Page for editing an existing hostel's room capacity and pricing details, fetching current data via useGetHostel and submitting updates via useUpdateHostel mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main landing page that fetches all hostels, applies category, search, price range, and sharing-type filters, sorts results, and renders them in a grid and map view.
frontend/src/pages/HostelDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single hostel, displaying an image gallery, room sharing/pricing options, location map, and category badge fetched by hostel ID.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Static page presenting the Hostel Finder privacy policy, covering data collection, usage, storage on the Internet Computer blockchain, user rights, and third-party services.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens (warm palette, category colors), border radius, fonts, container settings, and accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 21) for a hostel listing website with categories for girls, boys, and co-living spaces, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and requirements.
